task_description: Build the four category UX hub pages for ZeroUpload V2: /pdf, /image-converter (upgrade), /audio-converter (upgrade), /text. Each hub features a 'from -> to' format dropdown picker and a grid of category-specific tools. Hubs funnel users to existing per-pair SEO pages. Design follows Quiet Luxury brand system. Navigation updated to link all hubs.

verification.summary: npm registry blocked (403 via proxy). Build/test verification deferred to CI/Cloudflare preview. Structural verification passed. Semantic review v2: APPROVED with no blocking issues.
